notes: Public Rasa core facade delegates to a reserved `rasa.prim` backing primitive.
Alpha numeric semantics cover checked i64 and finite f64; full Clojure numeric tower parity is deferred.
functions.summary: Returns x negated, or the difference of nums.
-> projected as PortableEquivalent with status implemented-alpha.

deferred.name: delay
deferred.reason: deferred execution requires delayed value identity and forcing semantics

deferred.name: every?
deferred.reason: finite predicate traversal is supportable but not yet projected into the public core surface

deferred.name: force
deferred.reason: depends on delayed value representation

deferred.name: lazy-seq
deferred.reason: LazySeq object identity, forcing, caching, and realization timing are not yet admitted runtime values

deferred.name: or
deferred.reason: logical macro expansion surface is planned separately

deferred.name: partial
deferred.reason: partial application needs a portable closure/value contract across runtime and Wasm

deferred.name: reduced
deferred.reason: reduced wrapper value algebra is not yet represented

deferred.name: reduced?
deferred.reason: depends on reduced wrapper value representation

deferred.name: sequence
deferred.reason: depends on lazy sequence and transducer representation

deferred.name: some
deferred.reason: finite predicate traversal is supportable but not yet projected into the public core surface

deferred.name: transduce
deferred.reason: transducer arities and reduced short-circuit semantics are not yet admitted
